ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "place_name" TEXT /* Name of the place */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* ID of the province where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "province_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the province (e.g., AB, BC) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the province was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the province was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "north_lat" REAL /* Northern latitude boundary of the region */,
  "south_lat" REAL /* Southern latitude boundary of the region */,
  "east_long" REAL /* Eastern longitude boundary of the region */,
  "west_long" REAL /* Western longitude boundary of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_locations" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, logistics manager, driver) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the location */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the location was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_access_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., population, elevation) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_metadata_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., area, population) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_metadata_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage, trends) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
